hooks.command: powershell -Command "$r = Get-ChildItem reports\DSR*.html -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1; if ($r) { echo ('{\"systemMessage\": \"최신 보고서: ' + $r.Name + ' (' + $r.LastWriteTime.ToString('MM/dd HH:mm') + ')\"}') } else { echo '{\"systemMessage\": \"보고서 없음 — 먼저 shipbuilding_daily.py를 실행하세요\"}' }"

powershell -Command "$f = $input | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -ExpandProperty tool_input | Select-Object -ExpandProperty file_path; if ($f -match 'shipbuilding_daily\.py') { echo ('{\"systemMessage\": \"shipbuilding_daily.py 수정됨 — 실행하여 확인하세요\"}') }"
